## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? Keep it concise. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have run `npm run type-check` with no errors
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` with no warnings
- [ ] I have run `npm run format:check` with no issues
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where applicable
- [ ] I have updated documentation where applicable
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new security vulnerabilities
- [ ] API keys and secrets are not exposed in code or commits
